texto: Many people who wonder why they don't amount to more than they do have good stuff in them and are energetic persevering and have ample opportunities. It is all a case of trimming the useless branches and throwing the whole force of power into the development of something that counts.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Walter J. Johnston sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Many people who wonder why they don't amount to more than they do have good stuff in them and are…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, concentration, people, útil em momentos de reflexao.
